title: spiraea × pyramidata
intro: Spiraea × pyramidata, also known as the rose mayflower or pyramid spirea, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of the Spiraea media and Spiraea betulifolia species. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiraea × pyramidata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
